title: TinyQuant Calibration Results
description: Schema for tinyquant-bench/baselines/calibration-results.json committed calibration quality measurements.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema. Increment when fields are added.

captured_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the results were captured.

git_commit.description: Short git SHA of the commit the results were captured on.

corpus.description: Name of the calibration fixture used (e.g. openai_1k_d768).

results.description: Map of codec configuration name to quality measurements.

rho.description: Pearson ρ between original and reconstructed cosine-similarity distributions.

recall_at_10.description: Mean recall@10 over the first 100 query rows.
